h1: AI Room Visualizer: See How a Heat & Glo Fireplace Transforms Your Space

paragraphs: At Heat & Glo, we believe a fireplace isn’t just a heat source—it’s the heart of your home. It shapes the mood, anchors your space, and defines your style. Whether you’re building new or remodeling, our AI room visualizer makes it easy to see how a Heat & Glo fireplace can completely transform your room.Using ChatGPT, you can now upload a photo of your space, describe the fireplace you’re considering, and instantly receive a realistic digital mockup. It’s a fast, inspiring way to preview your vision before you commit—like having a virtual interior designer at your fingertips.
Whether you’re a DIY-er or working with a builder, this tool empowers you to make bold, beautiful choices.
Step 1: Choose the Fireplace You Want to Visualize

Before you begin, decide which Heat & Glo fireplace you want to see in your space. You can explore electric fireplace options here: Browse Heat & Glo Electric FireplacesSelecting the model first ensures a more accurate and tailored visualization.Step 2: Take a Clear Photo of Your Room
Stand far enough back to capture the full wall where the fireplace will go. Natural lighting helps AI generate better visuals.
Visit chat.openai.com and sign in.Step 4: Upload Your Room Photo
Click the photo icon (📷) to upload the image of your space.Step 5: Describe the Fireplace You Want to Visualize

Include as much detail as you can. Here's a sample prompt to copy and paste:“Hi ChatGPT, I want to visualize the Heat & Glo Allusion Platinum 60” electric fireplace centered on this wall. The wall is 14 feet wide and nine feet tall. I’m looking for a modern style with white paneling and a black frame. Can you show me what that would look like in my room?”
ChatGPT will generate a mockup based on your input. You can request changes—like adjusting the size, finish, or adding a mantel—to get it just right.
To get the most accurate visualization, provide:
Designing a space can feel overwhelming—but seeing it come to life with AI makes it exciting and simple.
This tool helps you visualize not just a product, but a feeling: what your room could become with the right fireplace as its centerpiece.
Head to Heat & Glo and choose the electric fireplace that fits your vision!
Design a wall that’s straight fire with a gas linear fireplace.
Everything you need to know about electric fireplaces, from how they operate to installation options.
Electric fireplaces are the no-more-excuses solution to cozying your space. But what do you need to know?
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
